message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Review Luca's Task #11 implementation now">
Luca has completed the Task #11 implementation (Navigation + Dashboard skeleton). Please review his work now and send your verdict to luca-palmieri.

Key files to review:
- `templates/gtd_nav.html` — the shared GTD nav partial
- `templates/dashboard.html` — dashboard with dl/dt/dd stats
- `src/routes/dashboard.rs` and `src/routes/gtd_placeholders.rs` — route handlers
- `static/css/main.css` — nav styles, quick capture, dashboard stats
- `templates/base.html` — hx-boost="true" on body
- `tests/api/dashboard.rs` — 8 new integration tests
- `e2e/user-journey.spec.ts` — updated e2e + axe-core dashboard scan

All tests pass (82 Rust + 7 Playwright). Review from your area of expertise and send approval or concerns to luca-palmieri. We need 9/9 consensus to commit.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I've already completed my thorough review of all the files and sent my detailed feedback to Luca with an APPROVE vote. Let me confirm this to the team lead.

input.content:
Already done. I reviewed all the key files (tests, routes, templates, e2e) and sent Luca a detailed TDD review with an APPROVE vote. 

Summary: 15 new integration tests + 2 new Playwright tests properly cover the acceptance criteria. Tests are behavior-focused, existing tests were correctly updated for the /dashboard redirect change, and no production code was written without corresponding tests. Three minor non-blocking observations noted (duplicated test helper, hardcoded counts not asserted, loose aria-current matching).

My vote: APPROVE.
input.summary: Already reviewed and approved Luca's Task #11

routing.summary: Already reviewed and approved Luca's Task #11

content.text: Standing by for the remaining team members to complete their reviews so we can reach 9/9 consensus on Task #11.
